issues.message: script.js contains many numeric weights/thresholds. Several are likely legitimate strategy weights, but they are not centralized in a single model contract.
Team Builder ranking, portfolio adjustment, and fallback scoring still live in script.js alongside UI rendering.
Generated artifact and browser optimizer are kept equivalent by QA, but two executable paths remain for the same concept.
Public copy generally uses caveats, but detailed numeric indices can read more precise than the evidence supports unless the caveat remains nearby.
